$Comment: MMO Mob Scaling BOSS classification tagset (native NPCGroup). A role in this group is classified SCOPE_BOSS: it is FORCED to the 'boss' rarity tier (Rarities/Boss.json, Weight 0 so it never rolls on the normal curve) instead of rolling the ladder. Owner/pack-editable: override this file to add or remove boss roles; wildcards are supported (native IncludeRoles semantics).
